quickgem.description: Architecting a high-scale, multitenant HealthTech ecosystem by consolidating legacy doctor and patient applications into a unified codebase using Jetpack Compose and MVI architecture. Integrated low-latency Agora SDK telehealth features and reactive hardware drivers for 6-in-1 medical monitors.
achievements: Unified legacy doctor and patient apps into a single Jetpack Compose & MVI codebase
Integrated Agora SDK for low-latency video calls and real-time doctor-patient chat
Architected reactive integrations for Spectra Care 6-in-1 medical hardware and EHR SOAP APIs

egora.description: Engineered high-scale reservation modules using Flutter, Dio, and GetIt, driving a 30% boost in customer adoption. Architected Jetpack Compose apps for Bluetooth thermal printing and integrated high-throughput payment gateways.
achievements: Engineered core reservation system in Flutter, driving a 30% increase in customer adoption
Architected Bluetooth thermal printer integration achieving 100% reliability and 50% reduced query latency
Integrated XStax payment gateway processing 10k+ monthly transactions with 99% uptime

healthwire.description: Developed a dual-app Patient/Doctor ecosystem using MVVM, Hilt/Dagger, Coroutines, and Flow. Scaled telehealth capabilities via Twilio video, secured local payment gateways, and migrated legacy UI to Jetpack Compose.
achievements: Boosted user engagement by 15% through Twilio video consultations and deep-link navigation
Maintained a 99%+ crash-free rate across dual apps via Firebase Crashlytics and Room DB optimization
Integrated Meezan, JazzCash, and Foree payment gateways with 100% security compliance

dongamers.description: Led mobile engineering for an international gaming platform[cite: 1]. Migrated legacy Java code to Kotlin, architected real-time chat infrastructure using Pusher, and optimized monetization frameworks[cite: 1].
achievements: Elevated app stability to 99% crash-free sessions and reduced production bugs by 20%[cite: 1]
Migrated app from Java to Kotlin with global availability (99% coverage)[cite: 1]
Architected real-time chat using Pusher (+15% engagement) and boosted sales by 10% via AdMob/IAP[cite: 1]

freelance.description: Architected and delivered responsive cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and Dart for international clients, managing full lifecycle delivery from UI prototyping to API integration[cite: 1].
achievements: Delivered high-fidelity cross-platform Flutter solutions, accelerating client time-to-market[cite: 1]
Managed end-to-end development lifecycles and stakeholder technical consultations[cite: 1]

netroots.description: Developed enterprise Java applications, including a GPS-based attendance system with image validation and automated HR administrative workflows[cite: 1].
achievements: Engineered Java GPS attendance system with image validation, boosting accuracy by 40%[cite: 1]
Automated HR profiling workflows, reducing manual administrative overhead by 50%[cite: 1]
